settings.text: Ten rooms across four styles, each with its own view and character.

settings.subtitle: From $245 / night
settings.title: The Garden Room
settings.description:
Our most popular room. A queen bed dressed in white linen, a wide window overlooking the garden, and a bathroom with a walk-in rain shower. Quiet, simple, and the kind of room that makes you sleep better than you have in months.

Sleeps 2 · Queen bed · Garden view · Rain shower · 280 sq ft

settings.subtitle: From $325 / night
settings.title: The Linden Suite
settings.description:
Our largest room. A king bed, a working stone fireplace, a leather reading chair, and exposed ceiling beams from the original 1896 build. The kind of room where you cancel your afternoon plans and stay in with a book.

Sleeps 2 · King bed · Fireplace · Clawfoot tub · 420 sq ft

settings.subtitle: From $215 / night
settings.title: The Orchard Room
settings.description:
Two twin beds with a view of the apple orchard through wide sash windows. Bright, cheerful, and perfect for friends traveling together or a family with older children. A small writing desk sits by the window for letters nobody writes anymore.

Sleeps 2 · Twin beds · Orchard view · Writing desk · 260 sq ft

settings.subtitle: From $385 / night
settings.title: The Tower Room
settings.description:
The house's most distinctive room, set in the original tower with panoramic windows on three sides and a high ornamental ceiling. A reading nook with cushions sits under the curved wall. The countryside stretches out in every direction — morning light floods the room from the east.

Sleeps 2 · King bed · Panoramic view · Reading nook · 360 sq ft

settings.title: Fresh Breakfast
settings.description: Full farm breakfast every morning from 8 to 10 AM, served in the dining room with local eggs, fresh bread, and seasonal fruit.

settings.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
settings.description: Complimentary throughout the property — in your room, on the porch, and in the garden.

settings.title: Free Parking
settings.description: Private on-site parking behind the house for all guests. No permits, no meters, no stress.

settings.title: Luxury Bathrooms
settings.description: Rain showers or clawfoot tubs depending on the room, heated tile floors, and hand-made bath products from a local apothecary.

settings.title: Two Acres of Gardens
settings.description: Landscaped grounds with stone paths, seating areas under old oaks, a cutting garden, and views of the valley in every direction.

settings.title: Evening Fireside
settings.description: The common room fireplace is lit every evening from October through April. Complimentary tea, coffee, and biscuits.

settings.text: Check availability or call us directly to reserve your room.
